summary: The Copilot resume proof now waits for the resumed turn count instead of reusing the stale first-turn assistant boundary.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/integration/chat-copilot-resume.test.ts --test-name "copilot resume-session path preserves the On and Off tool-registration contract"
targeted_proof.notes: Targeted server wrapper proved the resumed Copilot tool-access assertions now wait on the second assistant turn instead of the stale first-turn boundary.
